title: Fix liveness_reaper.py: accept raw hcom list --json shape
description: Fixes a real bug TASK-175's runtime-exercise audit found and reported: liveness_reaper.py's build_snapshot() crashed with AttributeError when fed the actual output shape of 'hcom list --json' (a list of session records keyed by 'name', not an agent-keyed dict). Adds normalize_hcom_status() which accepts either shape and wires it into main()'s --hcom-json loading path. Read the TASK-175 report (artifacts/reports/command-center-runtime-exercise-2026-07-14.md) and its finding #2 before editing.
acceptance_criteria: normalize_hcom_status() accepts both the raw hcom list --json shape and an already agent-keyed dict, producing the same normalized shape either way.
liveness_reaper.py --hcom-json no longer crashes when given real hcom list --json output; reproduces and fixes the exact AttributeError from TASK-175's report.
Focused regression tests cover both input shapes plus the malformed-input rejection case.
